expected_effect: Automate narrative compression that previously consumed manual optimize cycles, reducing protocol drift from narrative bloat
rationale: 20+ optimize cycles have been spent on manual narrative compression (consolidating entries, deduplicating, archiving). This skill automates the pattern detection and consolidation, freeing optimize cycles for meaningful work.

preconditions: manual narrative compression consuming optimize cycles
strategy: Parse evolution_narrative.md into structured blocks (entries, archives, text)
Identify groups of 3+ adjacent same-gene entries
Generate CONSOLIDATED blocks with summary stats
Apply compression in dry-run or apply mode
validation: node -e "const s = require(process.env.HOME+'/.claude/skills/evo-narrative-compactor'); s.main({}).then(r => console.log('entries:', r.entryCount, 'groups:', r.groups.length, 'saved:', r.saved))"

summary: Created evo-narrative-compactor skill that parses narrative into structured blocks, identifies 3+ adjacent same-gene entry groups, and auto-consolidates them into CONSOLIDATED blocks with dry-run/apply modes
